places.name: United Nations Ceiling
places.description: This colorful but controversial ceiling has been likened to a 21st-century Sistine Chapel.

places.name: La Tulipe
places.description: A rare, flower-shaped example of Brutalist architecture in Switzerland.

places.name: Treille Promenade
places.description: One of the longest wooden benches in the world snakes around Geneva's Treille Promenade.

places.name: Gravestone of Jorge Luis Borges
places.description: This famous writer's tombstone is a literary pilgrimage site that was publicly defiled by a rival.

places.name: Statue of Frankenstein's Monster
places.description: One of the most historical literary characters continues to stroll his hometown.

places.name: L’horloge Fleurie (The Flower Clock)
places.description: The world's largest second-hand graces a clock surrounded by constantly changing flower beds.

places.name: Café de Paris
places.description: The birthplace of a famous steak sauce still keeps its recipe a secret.

places.name: Le Frigo
places.description: Walk through a restaurant's refrigerator door to reach this hidden bar.
